initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(cards.id) AS total_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN cards.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) AS online_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN cards.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(cards.id), 2) AS percentage_online
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Brazil Portuguese';

SELECT 
    COUNT(cards.id) AS total_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN cards.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) AS online_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN cards.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(cards.id), 2) AS percentage_online
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Brazil Portuguese';

SELECT 
    COUNT(cards.id) AS total_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN cards.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) AS online_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN cards.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(cards.id), 2) AS percentage_online
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Brazil Portuguese';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN cards.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(cards.id) AS percentage_online_only
FROM 
    cards
JOIN 
    foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE 
    foreign_data.language = 'Brazil Portuguese';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN cards.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(cards.id) AS online_percentage
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Brazil Portuguese';
